creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
The channel got stuck on 13 (despite channel - or channel -1 and mode was set to 11a;  got me nowhere;  scan obviously did not return any;  couldn't get a trace for probe/beacons while running around.

Similar to historic problem of roaming between 11g and 11a not working...?

wlan0: flags=8c43<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,OACTIVE,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
        groups: wlan
        ssid "" channel 13 (2472 MHz 11g)
        regdomain ETSI country DE authmode WPA1+WPA2/802.11i privacy ON
        deftxkey UNDEF txpower 30 bmiss 10 scanvalid 60 protmode CTS wme
        roaming MANUAL
        parent interface: iwm0
        media: IEEE 802.11 Wireless Ethernet OFDM/18Mbps mode 11a (autoselect)
        status: no carrier
